title: APES Pet Care Clinic | Help for people on low incomes.
content_blocks: Welcome to the APES Pet Care Clinic, a dedicated non-profit charity committed to the health and well-being of all animals, including exotic species. Our primary goal is to assist pet owners in maintaining their pets' health by offering affordable consultations and treatments, especially for those who may lack the funds for veterinary services.
Our Services:
Reptile Services: We provide specialized care for reptiles, including shedding aid, fang removal, respiratory infection treatment, claw clippings, and parasite removal.
Invert Services: Our clinic offers care for invertebrates, ensuring their unique needs are met.
Dog and Cat Services: We offer routine care and treatments for dogs and cats, such as flea and worming treatments, claw clippings, and more.
Health Care Plans: Tailored plans to keep your pet in optimal health.
Faecal Testing: Laboratory services to detect and address potential health issues.
Please note that while we are not a veterinary practice, we are a pet clinic equipped to handle routine care, treatments, and some first aid services.
Our Commitment:
Non-Profit Charity: As a non-profit organization, we are dedicated to animal welfare of all types and species.
Helping Low Incomes & No Incomes: We charge small fees to help keep our services going, aiming to assist those who may lack the funds for veterinary consultations.
Animal Welfare Is Our Top Priority: We are not here to judge; our focus is to ensure your pet is healthy and safe, providing you with the knowledge and support needed to achieve this.

At APES Pet Care Clinic, we believe that every pet deserves quality care, and every owner should have access to the resources necessary to provide it. Our team of trained and qualified staff is here to help you keep your pet fit and healthy.
Subscribe to our newsletter
Stay informed about our latest updates through email. Subscribe here.
Signup For Our Newsletter

APES Pet Care Clinic provides affordable care for all animals, from dogs and cats to exotic pets. Our newsletter offers valuable advice on pet health, nutrition, and wellbeing, plus updates on our clinic services, including:
Health checks
Flea & worming treatments
Claw clipping
And more! Join our community of pet lovers and subscribe today!
"We have partnered up with Veterian App to provide the best service possible"
Exotic Vets
Finding it hard to find a Exotc Vet?
Vets 4 Exotics Vets is one of the many vets in the Manchester area that is a exotic vet.

We now provide consultations for people needing non-emergency advice and support. From skin irritations to, ear irritations, ingrowing claws and more we may be able to help without the need of a vet consultation.
Domestic Vets
Finding it hard to find a Vet?
Bold Vets is one of the many vets in the Merseyside area that is a mixed vet.
Finding it hard to find a Exotic Vet?
Rutland House is our closest vets in the St Helens area that is a mixed vet.
Medical and Health?
There is a fine line between health and medical situations. Not all situations need a VET or to pay out for a VET consolation.
At APES Pet Care Clinic we charge a small fee to see and assess your pet by trained qualified staff.
Please note we are not a VET but a way to verify if a VET is needed or home treatment can be done at the fraction of the price.
Our Staff Have a Number Of Qualifications
Here are some of the qualifications our staff hold.
Level 3 Award in Small Animal Care and Welfare
Level 3 Diploma Animal Welfare Officer
Level 3 Diploma in Animal Assisted Intervention
Level 3 Award for Pet Care in Retail
Level 3 Certificate in Canine Nutrition
Access to Higher Education Diploma (Veterinary Science)
Pet Care Clinic
The clinic is a first aid clinic, we do not do operations or invasive procedures. What we can do is;
Assess and advise if veterinary treatment is needed. We can also refer you to the best vet possible for you.
Perform health checks and advise you if you need to have something suspect to be seen by a vet.
Our Staff
Our staff are fully trained and qualified to perform the services APES Pet Care Clinic provides.

title: About Us | APES Pet Care Clinic
content_blocks: Keeping a healthy pet
This is our primary goal at the clinic.

Keep your pet fit and healthy, APES is not just dedicated to the exotic species but all animal life. We are a team of trained and qualified staff are here to help people who lack the funds just to get a consultation to speak to a vet to see if it is a common issue or to confirm that a VET is needed.

Helping Low Incomes & No Incomes
We charge small fees to help keep our services going, we would like to give the service for free but if we did we would not be able to continue to the work we do.
Animal Welfare Is Our Top Priority
We are not here to judge, we just want to ensure your pet is healthy and safe, and that you have the knowledge and support needed to achieve this.

title: APES Pet Care Clinic Lab Services
content_blocks: Lab Services

At APES Pet Care Clinic, we are committed to providing top-notch care for your exotic pets. In partnership with a renowned laboratory in Kent, we offer cost-effective testing services that help you avoid the higher costs typically associated with veterinary clinics. Our collaboration ensures that you receive accurate and timely test results, all while maintaining the highest standards of quality care.

We understand the importance of seamless communication between pet owners and veterinary professionals. Therefore, upon request, we can conveniently transfer your pet's test results directly to your veterinarian, ensuring that your pet's medical records are comprehensive and up-to-date.

Visit us and experience the dedicated service that prioritizes your pet's well-being, ensuring they remain healthy and happy. Whether you're a seasoned pet owner or new to the world of exotic pets, our clinic is here to support your needs with expertise and compassion. Welcome to a community that truly cares for your exotic family members!

Our Rates
Faecal Test 1
Aerobic Culture, Salmonella, Campylobacter, Species Specific Sensitivity.
Faecal Test 2
Aerobic Culture, Salmonella, Campylobacter, Species Specific Sensitivity, full parasitology.
Faecal Screen
This is a microscopy for the detection of Ova, Protozoa, Cysts and parasites, Including Coccidia, Giardia, Trichmonas.
Giardia (Qualitative)
This Is an immunochromatographic assay.
Giardia (PCR)
Full Parasitology
Direct and concentrate examination for Helminth ova, Protozoa, Protozoal Cysts, including Giardia, Cryptosporidia, and Amoeba.
UCCR
Urine testing for hyperadrenocorticism
UPCR
This is a test for kidney function and damage.
Toxoplasma Gondii PCR

At the moment we run a booking only service as we have other services we provide. We can not deal with walk-ins for our pet care clinic.
Rutland House Veterinary Hospital
In an emergency, please call 01744 853510.

Unfortunately, there are occasions when your pet might need emergency treatment. It may have been in a life-threatening accident or your pet may have developed a sudden illness which needs urgent care.This can be very distressing but here at Rutland House we are proud to have a 24-hour emergency care service at our hospital. Should the situation arise you can be assured that your pet is being looked after by our team 24 hours a day, 365 days a year.Evening Clinics - Rutland House Veterinary Hospital Group Clients Only Consultation fee £114.48Monday-Friday: 6.00pm – 8.00pm*Out of Hours Emergency Service Consultation fee £188.48Monday-Friday: After 6.00pm*Saturday: All day Sunday: All day Bank Holidays: All day* To non-member practice clients from 8.00pm, Consultation fee £224.10.All prices include VAT

title: Donate To APES CIC
content_blocks: The Pet Care Clinic

Without your generous donations, the APES CIC Pet Care Clinic could not deliver vital veterinary services to pet owners facing financial hardship. Your gift helps us cover the cost of treatments, medications, and community outreach, keeping pets healthy and families together.
How to Donate
Choose a one-time or recurring gift that fits your budget
To donate equipment or supplies, email info@apes.org.uk
Every contribution—large or small—makes a real difference to pets in need. Thank you for standing with APES CIC and supporting our mission.

title: Booking Policy
content_blocks: Booking Policy for APES Pet Care Clinic
Effective Date: 19/06/2025

This Booking Policy outlines the terms and conditions related to making and managing appointments at APES Pet Care Clinic (“we”, “us”, “our”). By booking an appointment, you agree to adhere to this policy.

Booking Process All appointments must be booked through our website www.apespetcare.org.uk or directly via our contact channels. Accurate and complete information about you and your pet is required at the time of booking.

Payment and Non-Refundable Policya. Payment: Full payment for services is due at the time of booking, either online or in person.b. Non-Refundable: All booking payments are strictly non-refundable. Once a booking is confirmed and payment has been processed, no refunds will be issued, regardless of circumstances. This policy is in place because we allocate resources and schedule staff based on your confirmed appointment.c. No-Show Policy: Failure to attend the scheduled appointment without prior notice (a “DNA” - Did Not Attend) will result in the loss of the payment made at booking, and no rescheduling or refund will be provided.

Changes and Cancellationsa. Changes: Requests to reschedule your appointment must be made at least 48 hours prior to the scheduled time and are subject to availability. We cannot guarantee changes will be accommodated.b. Cancellations: As payments are non-refundable, cancelling an appointment will not entitle you to a refund. However, if you wish to cancel, please inform us at least 48 hours in advance to avoid any penalties or charges for late cancellations.c. Late Arrivals & No-Shows: Arriving late may result in a shortened appointment or rescheduling, subject to availability. Failure to attend without prior notice (DNA) will lead to the forfeiture of your payment.

Our Right to Cancel or Reschedule We reserve the right to cancel or reschedule any appointment due to unforeseen circumstances or operational needs. In such cases, we will endeavour to notify you as soon as possible and offer alternative slots.
Booking Policy Link For more detailed information, please review our full Booking Policy at http://www.apespetcare.org.uk/booking-policy .
Acceptance of Policy Booking an appointment constitutes acceptance of this Booking Policy and the associated Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not make a booking.
Thank you for choosing APES Pet Care Clinic. We look forward to caring for your pets responsibly.

title: Privacy Policy
content_blocks: Privacy Policy for APES Pet Care Clinic
Effective Date: 19/06/2025

At APES Pet Care Clinic (“we”, “us”, “our”), we are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website www.apespetcare.org.uk , make bookings, or engage with our services.
Information We Collect We may collect the following types of personal data:
Contact Information: name, address, email, phone number
Pet Details: name, breed, age, medical history, and other relevant information
Payment Data: payment method, transaction details (processed securely)
Usage Data: website visits, browsing behaviour, device information, IP address
Communications: correspondence with us, inquiries, feedback
How We Use Your Data Your data is used for the following purposes:
To process bookings, payments, and service requests
To communicate with you regarding appointments, updates, or promotions
To improve our website, services, and overall customer experience
To comply with legal obligations and enforce our terms and conditions
To protect the security and integrity of our systems
Data Sharing and Security We do not sell or rent your personal data. We may share information:
With trusted third-party service providers for payment processing, IT support, or marketing (all subject to confidentiality obligations)
If required by law or in connection with legal proceedings
During any business transfer, such as a merger or sale of assets

We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your data against unauthorised access, loss, or theft. However, transmission over the internet can never be guaranteed 100% secure, so you provide your information at your own risk.

Data Retention We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy, including for legal, accounting, or reporting obligations. Once the data is no longer needed, it is securely deleted or anonymised.
Your Rights Under data protection law, you have rights to:
Access the personal data we hold about you
Request correction or deletion of your data
Withdraw consent where processing is based on consent
Object to or restrict certain processing activities
Data portability to transfer your data elsewhere
To exercise these rights, or if you have concerns about our data practices, please contact us at privacy@apes.org.uk .

Children’s Privacy Our services are not directed at children under 16, and we do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If you believe we have inadvertently collected such data, please notify us.

Changes to this Privacy Policy We may update this policy periodically to reflect legal or operational changes. When updated, the revised version will be posted on our website with a new effective date. Continued use of our services indicates acceptance of any changes.
Contact If you have any questions or concerns regarding this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact our Data Protection Officer at:Email: privacy@apes.org.uk
Thank you for trusting APES Pet Care Clinic with your pet’s wellbeing and your personal data.

title: Refund Policy
content_blocks: Refund Policy for APES Pet Care Clinic
Effective Date: 19/06/2025

At APES Pet Care Clinic (“we”, “us”, “our”), customer satisfaction and transparency are important to us. Please review our refund policy carefully. By purchasing products or services from us, you agree to the terms outlined below.

Booking Payments All bookings and service appointments require full payment at the time of booking. Once a booking is confirmed and payment is processed, it is strictly non-refundable. We do not offer refunds or credits for cancellations, no-shows (“DNA”), or late cancellations. This policy is in place because we allocate resources and reserve time specifically for each booking.

Product Purchasesa. General Refunds: Refunds on products purchased from APES Pet Care Clinic are only available for unopened, unused items returned within 30 days of purchase, with a valid receipt, and in their original packaging.b. Non-Refundable Items: Certain products, such as prescription medications, health supplements, or tailored items, may be marked as non-refundable at the point of sale.c. Open or Used Products: We cannot provide refunds or exchanges for any animal health and wellbeing products that have been opened, used, or tampered with, due to safety and hygiene reasons.

Animal Health and Wellbeing Products All health-related products (e.g., medication, food, supplements) are non-refundable once opened or used. If a product is unopened and in its original packaging, a refund may be issued within 30 days of purchase, subject to the above conditions.

Services Payments for all services, including grooming, consultations, behavioural advice, or wellness checks, are non-refundable once booked and paid. If you need to reschedule or cancel, please refer to our Booking Policy for details, as no refunds are available.

Exceptions and Discretionary Refunds In exceptional circumstances, and at our sole discretion, we may issue a refund or credit if the product is defective or clearly not as described, and only if returned within the applicable time frame and in accordance with our return procedures.
Contact for Refund Inquiries For questions regarding refunds or to initiate a return, please contact us at:Email: privacy@apes.org.uk

Limitation of Liability While we strive to provide high-quality products and services, we shall not be liable for any damages, losses, or injuries resulting from the use of products or services, nor for any delays or difficulties in processing refunds.

Changes to this Refund Policy We reserve the right to modify or update this Refund Policy at any time. Changes will be posted on our website and are effective immediately upon posting. Continued purchases or use of our services after updates signifies your acceptance of the revised policy.
Thank you for choosing APES Pet Care Clinic. We appreciate your understanding and cooperation.

title: Terms And Conditions
content_blocks: Terms and Conditions for APES Pet Care Clinic
Effective Date: 19/06/2025
Welcome to www.apespetcare.org.uk (“the Website”). By accessing and using our services, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and conditions. Please read them carefully.

About Us APES Pet Care Clinic is dedicated to providing high-quality, compassionate pet care services, including grooming, health consultations, behavioural advice, and general pet wellness. Our mission is to ensure the health, happiness, and wellbeing of your pets through professional and caring services. Our contact details are:Website: www.apespetcare.org.uk Phone: 0300 302 0228Email: info@apes.org.uk

Website Usagea. Content: All information, images, and data provided on the Website are for general informational purposes only. While we strive to keep our content accurate and up-to-date, we do not guarantee its accuracy or completeness.b. Access: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue the Website at any time without notice.c. Conduct: Users agree not to use the Website for any unlawful or prohibited activity, including but not limited to infringing on intellectual property rights, transmitting harmful data, or attempting to disrupt the site’s operations.

Bookings and Appointmentsa. Booking Process: All bookings and service appointments must be made via our Website or directly through our contact channels. A valid booking requires accurate personal and pet information.b. Non-Refundable Policy: All booking payments are non-refundable. This policy is in place because, once a booking is confirmed and a slot reserved, we allocate resources and staff. No-shows or cancellations by clients will not entitle the client to a refund. This policy applies regardless of the reason for non-attendance, including illness or unforeseen circumstances.c. Cancellation and Changes: Requests for date or time changes must be made at least 48 hours in advance and are subject to availability. Changes are not guaranteed and may incur additional charges.d. No Attended Appointments (“DNA”): Failure to attend a booked appointment without prior notice will result in a forfeiture of the payment made at booking.e. Booking Policy: For detailed information regarding our booking terms, please review our Booking Policy .

Paymentsa. Payment Methods: Payments can be made online via our booking platform or in-person at the clinic by cash or card, as applicable.b. Currency: All transactions are conducted in GBP (£).c. Full Payment: Full payment for services must be received at the time of booking or prior to service delivery.d. Non-Refundable: As detailed above, all payments are non-refundable once processed. No refunds are provided for cancellations or no-shows.

Legal and Data Protectiona. Personal Data: We comply with the Data Protection Act 2018 and GDPR requirements. Personal data will be used solely for service provision, communication, and legal compliance.b. Intellectual Property: All content on the Website remains the property of APES Pet Care Clinic or its licensors and must not be reproduced or used without our consent.c. Liability: We shall not be liable for any damages, losses, or injuries resulting from the use of our services or information provided on the Website.

Limitation of Liability While we strive to provide the best care and service, APES Pet Care Clinic shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use our services or the Website.

Changes to Terms and Conditions We reserve the right to amend these terms and conditions at any time without prior notice. Continued use of our services following any update constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.
Governing Law These terms and conditions are governed by the laws of England and Wales. Any disputes will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of England and Wales.
Contact Us For questions regarding these terms and conditions, or to discuss bookings and services, please contact us:Website: www.apespetcare.org.uk Phone: 0300 302 0228Email: info@apes.org.uk
By making a booking or accessing our services, you acknowledge you have read, understood, and agreed to these terms and conditions.

This document is prepared in accordance with current UK laws and best practices for pet care services. We appreciate your trust in APES Pet Care Clinic and look forward to caring for your pets responsibly and compassionately.
